issues.description: Action type 'GiveKeyword' with 'Unblockable' is incorrect. Card effect is about changing attack target, not granting Unblockable. Correct action should be a redirect/change-target mechanic (likely 'ChangeAttackTarget' or similar redirect action).
Trigger 'OnAttacked' is incorrect. Card text says '[On Your Opponent's Attack]' which should be 'OnAttack' (opponent's attack phase), not 'OnAttacked' (when this card is attacked).
Condition missing '[Once Per Turn]' constraint. Should include 'type: "OncePerTurn"' or equivalent turn-limit condition.
Duration 'EndOfBattle' is incorrect for a redirect effect. Target change should persist for the attack (duration should reflect attack resolution scope, not battle duration).
